title: helichrysum stenopterum
intro: Helichrysum stenopterum, also known as the yellow feather or strawflower, is a flowering plant species native to Australia, characterized by its bright yellow or cream-colored inflorescences. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oil content. The health benefits of Helichrysum stenopterum include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as its potential to promote wound healing and improve respiratory issues. Helichrysum stenopterum is often used in herbal preparations, such as essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
